hero.title: Hello, my name is Chingizhan
hero.text: I am a junior front-end developer with good skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. I strive to create beautiful and functional websites that provide an excellent user experience. My ultimate goal is to become a SENIOR.

about.title: About Me
about.meText: Hello, my name is Chingizhan. I am a beginner frontend developer who enjoys creating modern websites and user interfaces. I like learning new technologies and improving my skills step by step. My goal is to become a strong developer, work in a good company and grow professionally in the field of SENIOR development.
about.frontendText: I started learning frontend because I liked the idea of creating something from nothing — turning simple code into real websites and interfaces. I enjoy the mix of design and programming. Also, web development is a strong and перспективная profession that gives good opportunities for growth and a stable career.

services.title: What I do
services.webText: I create clean and structured website layouts based on Figma designs using HTML, CSS and SCSS. I focus on accurate spacing, typography and visual consistency.
services.frontendText: I build responsive and interactive interfaces using JavaScript and React. I pay attention to usability, performance and simple but effective user experience.
services.uiText: I convert design concepts into real working interfaces. I try to keep layouts clean, readable and close to the original design while maintaining good code structure.
services.adaptiveText: I make websites адаптивными for all devices including mobile, tablet and desktop. I ensure layouts look correct and remain user-friendly on different screen sizes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: These are my contacts. I am always open to cooperation and new opportunities.
